productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Icurbantrack Solver Black Shoe
description: An absolute pleasure for your feet, the Urbantrack-Solver II is a great slip-on for men of style. Upper Lightly nubuck distressed scuff resistant smooth leather upper for mildly rugged look and durability Scuff resistant leather design for style and easy maintenance Stitch detailing for durability and style Canvas overlays for added shoe structure Dual stitched seam bicycle style toe design Perforations on toe and side forefoot for ventilation Center front seam detail Subtle S side logo embroidery Side elastic fabric panels for easy wear and snug Fit Heel pull on loop Padded collar and soft fabric shoe lining for in-step comfort Midsole Shock absorbing midsole for durability and impact protection Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Flexible rubber Urbantrack outsole with cleated traction design Arched midfoot in leather for added style and ergonomic comfort Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
